name: Popcorn Snacks
recipeInstructions:
1. For a TV snack or something to take to the game that stays fresh and crisp, try seasoned popcorn.
2. Pop corn without fat using directions on popper.
3. Season to taste with any of the following: butter-flavored salt, taco seasoning, garlic salt, onion salt, parmesan cheese, dried herbs, hickory flavored salt (Great outdoors), or seasoned salt.
4. To share with your feathered friends, string leftover popcorn and hang outside for a healthy treat.
5. In winter months, birds would love a bit of bacon fat rubbed on the leftover corn.
WARNING: Ensure the rewritten recipe remains strictly accurate to the original. Do not invent ingredients, change quantities, or alter the core cooking instructions.
